debug_info.goal:
case left
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
I : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
c : C
⊢ iSupIndep fun p => ↑p c

failed_attempts: exact I.sSupIndep.iSupIndep.map (fun p => p.val c) fun p => (PersistenceSubmodule.eval c).monotone

exact I.sSupIndep.iSupIndep.map (fun p => p c) (fun p => PersistenceSubmodule.eval_mono c)

exact I.sSupIndep.iSupIndep_of_injective_of_monotone (fun p => p.val c)
      (fun p q h => Subtype.ext (PersistenceSubmodule.ext (fun x => by
        have := congr_arg (· x) (congrArg (·.val) h)
        simp only at this
        exact this))) (fun p q hpq x => hpq x)
